'''鈭歫-r-n''' ('''kajaran''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unarm|unarm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unarm|unarm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-r-n
|-
! Lemma
| kajaran
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijaran|thijaran]] || [[word:jijaran|jijaran]] || [[word:shijaran|shijaran]] || [[word:kijaran|kijaran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujaran|thuthujaran]] || [[word:jujujaran|jujujaran]] || [[word:shushujaran|shushujaran]] || [[word:kukujaran|kukujaran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujaran|thujaran]] || [[word:jujaran|jujaran]] || [[word:shujaran|shujaran]] || [[word:kujaran|kujaran]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujaran|thujaran]] || [[word:jujaran|jujaran]] || [[word:shujaran|shujaran]] || [[word:kujaran|kujaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejaran|thejaran]] || [[word:jejaran|jejaran]] || [[word:shejaran|shejaran]] || [[word:kejaran|kejaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojaran|thothojaran]] || [[word:jojojaran|jojojaran]] || [[word:shoshojaran|shoshojaran]] || [[word:kokojaran|kokojaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojaran|thojaran]] || [[word:jojaran|jojaran]] || [[word:shojaran|shojaran]] || [[word:kojaran|kojaran]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojaran|thojaran]] || [[word:jojaran|jojaran]] || [[word:shojaran|shojaran]] || [[word:kojaran|kojaran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jaran|th忙jaran]] || [[word:j忙jaran|j忙jaran]] || [[word:sh忙jaran|sh忙jaran]] || [[word:k忙jaran|k忙jaran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajaran|thathajaran]] || [[word:jajajaran|jajajaran]] || [[word:shashajaran|shashajaran]] || [[word:kakajaran|kakajaran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajaran|thajaran]] || [[word:jajaran|jajaran]] || [[word:shajaran|shajaran]] || [[word:kajaran|kajaran]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajaran|thajaran]] || [[word:jajaran|jajaran]] || [[word:shajaran|shajaran]] || [[word:kajaran|kajaran]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajaran|shajaran]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajaran|goshajaran]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajaran|gokishajaran]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajaran眉|shajaran眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajarankn眉|goshajarankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajaran眉|gokishajaran眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajaransh毛|shajaransh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajaranksh毛|goshajaranksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajaransh毛|gokishajaransh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajaranro|shajaranro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajarankro|goshajarankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajaranro|gokishajaranro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajaranmu|shajaranmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajarankmu|goshajarankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajaranmu|gokishajaranmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajaransher|shajaransher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajaranksher|goshajaranksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajaransher|gokishajaransher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajarang|shajarang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajarankng|goshajarankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajarang|gokishajarang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajaranya|shajaranya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajarankya|goshajarankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajaranya|gokishajaranya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajaranyam|shajaranyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajarankyam|goshajarankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajaranyam|gokishajaranyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajaran眉sh毛|shajaran眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajarankn眉sh毛|goshajarankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajaran眉sh毛|gokishajaran眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajaran眉ro|shajaran眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajarankn眉ro|goshajarankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajaran眉ro|gokishajaran眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajaran眉mu|shajaran眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajarankn眉mu|goshajarankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajaran眉mu|gokishajaran眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajaransh毛n眉|shajaransh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajaranksh毛n眉|goshajaranksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajaransh毛n眉|gokishajaransh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajaransh毛ro|shajaransh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajaranksh毛ro|goshajaranksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajaransh毛ro|gokishajaransh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajaransh毛mu|shajaransh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajaranksh毛mu|goshajaranksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajaransh毛mu|gokishajaransh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajaranron眉|shajaranron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajarankron眉|goshajarankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajaranron眉|gokishajaranron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajaranrosh毛|shajaranrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajarankrosh毛|goshajarankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajaranrosh毛|gokishajaranrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajaranromu|shajaranromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajarankromu|goshajarankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajaranromu|gokishajaranromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajaranmun眉|shajaranmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajarankmun眉|goshajarankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajaranmun眉|gokishajaranmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajaranmush毛|shajaranmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajarankmush毛|goshajarankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajaranmush毛|gokishajaranmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajaranmuro|shajaranmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajarankmuro|goshajarankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajaranmuro|gokishajaranmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
